svg.text: Incomplete measure before the first full bar
The dot extends duration by half
One note continues into the next bar
Musical time contains meters, durations, pickup measures, dotted notes and tied notes.
All of them require one common temporal coordinate system.
TIME60 allows musical time to be represented as a precise coordinate axis.
Pitch is organized by temperament. Musical time is represented in the TIME60 system.
This keeps pitch, rhythm and resonance development inside one coordinate space.
